case_title: MSW CAPITAL, LLC VS. WANDA MEDINA et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-21-2014 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-21-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MSW CAPITAL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA, WANDA DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-02-2014
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-21-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE.
